questions.indicator: Identifying the main idea of a short text
questions.question:
Read the text "School Library". Rina visits the school library every Tuesday. She borrows one storybook and returns it the following week. She likes animal stories because they are funny and easy to understand.
What is the main idea of the text?

options.B: A list of objects owned by Rina
options.C: A problem that has no solution
options.D: An invitation to cancel an activity

questions.explanation: The entire paragraph focuses on rina's weekly library activity.

questions.question: According to the text, when does the activity happen?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states: Tuesday.

questions.question: The word "borrows" is closest in meaning to ...

options.A: a place that cannot be entered
options.B: an action done without a reason
options.C: takes something to use and return later

questions.explanation: In the paragraph, "borrows" means takes something to use and return later.

questions.question: In the sentence "The activity helps achieve the goal," the reference is most closely related to ...
questions.explanation: The reference points back to a storybook.

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb form for a habitual action
questions.question: Rina ... the plan carefully every week.
questions.explanation: A singular subject in a habitual action takes the simple-present form "reviews".

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb for a completed event
questions.question: Last week, the group ... a similar activity.
questions.explanation: "Last week" signals the simple past, so the correct verb is "visited".

questions.question: Notice: "Please complete the activity log before leaving." What should participants do?

options.B: Wait until next month to read it
options.C: Fill in the log before they leave

questions.explanation: The notice asks participants to complete the log before leaving.

questions.indicator: Drawing a logical inference from a text
questions.question: Why is the action in the text useful?

options.A: because it makes the activity impossible
options.B: they are funny and easy to understand
options.D: because it prevents anyone from learning

questions.explanation: The benefit can be inferred from the stated purpose: they are funny and easy to understand.

questions.question: The writer's main purpose is to ...

options.A: inform readers about an activity and its benefit

questions.explanation: The paragraph informs readers about the activity and explains its benefit.

questions.indicator: Selecting an appropriate response in a discussion
questions.question: A friend says, "We will present our findings tomorrow." What is the best response?

options.A: I never listen to any findings.
options.D: Great. Let's check the evidence once more.

questions.explanation: "Great. Let's check the evidence once more" is relevant, polite, and supports preparation.

questions.question:
Bacalah teks "Transportasi Umum" berikut.
Pemerintah kota menambah jadwal bus pada jam berangkat sekolah. Perubahan itu membuat waktu tunggu pelajar lebih singkat. Namun, halte di beberapa wilayah belum memiliki atap yang memadai. Pemerintah perlu memperbaiki fasilitas halte agar penggunaan bus semakin nyaman.
Gagasan utama teks tersebut adalah ...

options.A: Masalah dalam teks tidak memiliki hubungan dengan pembaca.
options.B: Peningkatan layanan bus perlu disertai perbaikan fasilitas halte.
options.D: Teks hanya berisi daftar nama orang.

questions.explanation: Gagasan tersebut merangkum seluruh uraian, yaitu peningkatan layanan bus perlu disertai perbaikan fasilitas halte.

questions.question: Pernyataan yang sesuai dengan isi teks adalah ...

options.A: Jadwal bus ditambah pada jam berangkat sekolah.
options.B: Kegiatan dalam teks tidak pernah dilakukan.
options.C: Seluruh data dalam teks berasal dari perkiraan tanpa pengamatan.
options.D: Teks menyatakan bahwa tidak ada manfaat yang diperoleh.

questions.explanation: Pernyataan itu disebutkan secara langsung dalam teks.

questions.question: Simpulan tersirat yang paling logis adalah ...

options.B: Masalah akan selesai tanpa tindakan apa pun.
options.C: Tokoh dalam teks tidak mempertimbangkan bukti.
options.D: Kenyamanan dapat memengaruhi minat menggunakan bus.

questions.explanation: Simpulan tersebut didukung oleh hubungan sebab-akibat dalam teks.

questions.question: Makna kata "memadai" pada teks adalah ...
questions.explanation: Dalam konteks kalimat, "memadai" berarti cukup dan sesuai kebutuhan.

questions.question: Tujuan penulis menyajikan teks tersebut adalah ...

options.B: menilai layanan bus dan mengusulkan perbaikannya

questions.explanation: Isi dan cara penyajian teks menunjukkan tujuan untuk menilai layanan bus dan mengusulkan perbaikannya.

questions.indicator: Memilih kalimat yang hemat dan logis
questions.question: Kalimat yang paling efektif adalah ...

options.A: Siswa memeriksa sumber informasi sebelum membagikannya.
options.B: Para siswa-siswa memeriksa sumber informasi terlebih dahulu sebelumnya.
options.C: Sumber informasi diperiksa oleh siswa agar supaya dapat dibagikan.
options.D: Siswa mereka memeriksa daripada sumber informasi.

questions.explanation: Kalimat "Siswa memeriksa sumber informasi sebelum membagikannya" hemat, memiliki subjek-predikat jelas, dan tidak mengandung kata mubazir.

questions.indicator: Memilih konjungsi yang sesuai hubungan makna
questions.question: Kegiatan itu memerlukan biaya awal yang besar, ... manfaat jangka panjangnya tetap perlu dipertimbangkan.
questions.explanation: Konjungsi "tetapi" menyatakan pertentangan antara biaya awal dan manfaat jangka panjang.

questions.indicator: Menerapkan huruf kapital dan tanda baca
questions.question: Penulisan kalimat yang sesuai kaidah adalah ...

options.A: Pada jum'at, Siswa mengunjungi perpustakaan daerah tegal.
options.B: Pada Jumat siswa, mengunjungi Perpustakaan daerah Tegal.
options.C: Pada Jumat, siswa mengunjungi Perpustakaan Daerah Tegal.
options.D: pada Jumat siswa mengunjungi perpustakaan daerah Tegal

questions.explanation: Kalimat "Pada Jumat, siswa mengunjungi Perpustakaan Daerah Tegal" menggunakan huruf kapital dan tanda baca secara tepat.

questions.indicator: Menilai ringkasan yang mewakili isi teks
questions.question: Ringkasan yang paling tepat untuk teks tersebut adalah ...

options.A: Teks membahas hal yang sama sekali berbeda dari judul.
options.B: Peningkatan layanan bus perlu disertai perbaikan fasilitas halte.
options.C: Jadwal bus ditambah pada jam berangkat sekolah.

questions.explanation: Ringkasan harus memuat inti teks, bukan hanya satu rincian.

questions.indicator: Menentukan bukti yang paling relevan untuk memperkuat gagasan
questions.question: Bukti yang paling tepat untuk memperkuat gagasan utama teks adalah ...

options.A: data hasil pengamatan sebelum dan sesudah tindakan
options.C: gambar yang tidak berkaitan dengan topik

questions.explanation: Data perbandingan sebelum dan sesudah tindakan paling relevan untuk menunjukkan dampak.

questions.indicator: Identifying the main idea of a short text
questions.question:
Read the text "Responsible AI". Dimas uses an artificial intelligence tool to generate study questions, but he does not accept every output immediately. He compares the answers with textbooks and rewrites unclear items. His approach treats the tool as an assistant rather than an unquestioned authority.
What is the main idea of the text?

options.A: An invitation to cancel an activity
options.B: AI output should be checked critically
options.C: A list of objects owned by Dimas
options.D: A problem that has no solution

questions.explanation: The entire paragraph focuses on ai output should be checked critically.

questions.question: In the text "Responsible AI", what object or activity is discussed?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly discusses generated study questions.

questions.question: The word "authority" is closest in meaning to ...

options.B: a place that cannot be entered
options.C: an action done without a reason
options.D: a source accepted as having reliable knowledge

questions.explanation: In the paragraph, "authority" means a source accepted as having reliable knowledge.

questions.question: In a summary of "Responsible AI", the phrase "this careful action" refers to ...

options.A: a plan that was never mentioned
options.D: an unrelated event outside the text

questions.explanation: The phrase points to the main object or action discussed, namely generated study questions.

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb form for a habitual action
questions.question: Dimas ... the plan carefully every week.
questions.explanation: A singular subject in a habitual action takes the simple-present form "reviews".

questions.indicator: Using a verb for an action connected to the present
questions.question: The team ... three sources before publishing the report.
questions.explanation: The singular collective subject takes "has checked" for a completed action relevant to the present.

questions.question: Announcement: "The final review session starts at 2 p.m. in Room 3. Bring your draft and source list." What must students bring?
questions.explanation: The announcement explicitly asks students to bring their draft and source list.

questions.indicator: Drawing a logical inference from a text
questions.question: Based on "Responsible AI", what attitude does Dimas show?
questions.explanation: The actions described show a responsible and thoughtful attitude.

questions.question: Why does the writer present the text "Responsible AI"?

options.B: To explain an activity and the reason it matters

questions.explanation: The paragraph explains the activity and its benefit or purpose.

questions.indicator: Selecting an appropriate response in an academic discussion
questions.question: A classmate says, "I found two sources with different conclusions." What is the best response?

options.A: Let's compare their evidence and publication context.
options.B: Choose the shorter source without reading it.
options.D: Assume every conclusion is equally accurate.

questions.explanation: Comparing evidence and context is a relevant critical response.

questions.question:
Bacalah teks "Mangrove Pesisir" berikut.
Warga menanam mangrove di tepi desa yang sering terkena abrasi. Akar mangrove memperlambat gelombang dan menahan sedimen. Kawasan itu kemudian menjadi tempat hidup kepiting serta ikan muda. Setelah tiga tahun, garis pantai di bagian yang ditanami tampak lebih stabil.
Gagasan utama teks tersebut adalah ...

options.A: Teks hanya berisi daftar nama orang.
options.B: Masalah dalam teks tidak memiliki hubungan dengan pembaca.
options.C: Penanaman mangrove membantu melindungi pesisir dan habitat.

questions.explanation: Gagasan tersebut merangkum seluruh uraian, yaitu penanaman mangrove membantu melindungi pesisir dan habitat.

questions.question: Pernyataan yang sesuai dengan isi teks adalah ...

options.A: Teks menyatakan bahwa tidak ada manfaat yang diperoleh.
options.B: Penanaman dilakukan di tepi desa yang terkena abrasi.
options.C: Kegiatan dalam teks tidak pernah dilakukan.
options.D: Seluruh data dalam teks berasal dari perkiraan tanpa pengamatan.

questions.explanation: Pernyataan itu disebutkan secara langsung dalam teks.

questions.question: Simpulan tersirat yang paling logis adalah ...

options.A: Mangrove memberi manfaat ekologis sekaligus perlindungan pantai.
options.C: Masalah akan selesai tanpa tindakan apa pun.
options.D: Tokoh dalam teks tidak mempertimbangkan bukti.

questions.explanation: Simpulan tersebut didukung oleh hubungan sebab-akibat dalam teks.

questions.question: Makna kata "sedimen" pada teks adalah ...
questions.explanation: Dalam konteks kalimat, "sedimen" berarti material yang mengendap.

questions.question: Tujuan penulis menyajikan teks tersebut adalah ...

options.C: menjelaskan manfaat mangrove bagi wilayah pesisir

questions.explanation: Isi dan cara penyajian teks menunjukkan tujuan untuk menjelaskan manfaat mangrove bagi wilayah pesisir.

questions.indicator: Identifying the main idea of a short text
questions.question:
Read the text "Mangrove Visit". Last Saturday, the science club visited a mangrove area. A guide explained that mangrove roots reduce coastal erosion and provide shelter for young fish. The students recorded their observations without disturbing the habitat.
What is the main idea of the text?

options.A: A problem that has no solution
options.B: An invitation to cancel an activity
options.C: Students learn the value of mangroves
options.D: A list of objects owned by the science club

questions.explanation: The entire paragraph focuses on students learn the value of mangroves.

questions.question: According to the text, when does the activity happen?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states: last Saturday.

questions.question: The word "shelter" is closest in meaning to ...

options.C: a place that cannot be entered
options.D: an action done without a reason

questions.explanation: In the paragraph, "shelter" means a safe place for protection.

questions.question: In the sentence "The activity helps achieve the goal," the reference is most closely related to ...
questions.explanation: The reference points back to a mangrove area.

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb form for a habitual action
questions.question: the science club ... the plan carefully every week.
questions.explanation: A singular subject in a habitual action takes the simple-present form "reviews".

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb for a completed event
questions.question: Last week, the group ... a similar activity.
questions.explanation: "Last week" signals the simple past, so the correct verb is "conducted".

questions.question: Notice: "Please complete the activity log before leaving." What should participants do?

options.A: Fill in the log before they leave
options.D: Wait until next month to read it

questions.explanation: The notice asks participants to complete the log before leaving.

questions.indicator: Drawing a logical inference from a text
questions.question: Why is the action in the text useful?

options.B: because it prevents anyone from learning
options.C: because it makes the activity impossible

questions.explanation: The benefit can be inferred from the stated purpose: to observe the habitat responsibly.

questions.question: The writer's main purpose is to ...

options.C: inform readers about an activity and its benefit

questions.explanation: The paragraph informs readers about the activity and explains its benefit.

questions.indicator: Selecting an appropriate response in a discussion
questions.question: A friend says, "We will present our findings tomorrow." What is the best response?

options.B: Great. Let's check the evidence once more.
options.C: I never listen to any findings.

questions.explanation: "Great. Let's check the evidence once more" is relevant, polite, and supports preparation.

questions.indicator: Identifying the main idea of a short text
questions.question:
Read the text "Energy Audit". The student council conducted an energy audit in the school building. Their data showed that lights and air conditioners were often left on in empty rooms. They proposed reminder labels and a weekly monitoring team to lower electricity consumption.
What is the main idea of the text?

options.A: A list of objects owned by the student council
options.B: A problem that has no solution
options.C: An invitation to cancel an activity
options.D: An audit leads to practical energy-saving actions

questions.explanation: The entire paragraph focuses on an audit leads to practical energy-saving actions.

questions.question: According to the text, when does the activity happen?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states: during an energy audit.

questions.question: The word "consumption" is closest in meaning to ...

options.A: an action done without a reason
options.D: a place that cannot be entered

questions.explanation: In the paragraph, "consumption" means the amount of something used.

questions.question: In the sentence "The activity helps achieve the goal," the reference is most closely related to ...
questions.explanation: The reference points back to electricity use in the school.

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb form for a habitual action
questions.question: the student council ... the plan carefully every week.
questions.explanation: A singular subject in a habitual action takes the simple-present form "reviews".

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb for a completed event
questions.question: Last week, the group ... a similar activity.
questions.explanation: "Last week" signals the simple past, so the correct verb is "conducted".

questions.question: Notice: "Please complete the activity log before leaving." What should participants do?

options.A: Wait until next month to read it
options.B: Fill in the log before they leave

questions.explanation: The notice asks participants to complete the log before leaving.

questions.indicator: Drawing a logical inference from a text
questions.question: Why is the action in the text useful?

options.C: because it prevents anyone from learning
options.D: because it makes the activity impossible

questions.explanation: The benefit can be inferred from the stated purpose: to lower electricity consumption.

questions.question: The writer's main purpose is to ...

options.D: inform readers about an activity and its benefit

questions.explanation: The paragraph informs readers about the activity and explains its benefit.

questions.indicator: Selecting an appropriate response in a discussion
questions.question: A friend says, "We will present our findings tomorrow." What is the best response?

options.C: Great. Let's check the evidence once more.
options.D: I never listen to any findings.

questions.explanation: "Great. Let's check the evidence once more" is relevant, polite, and supports preparation.
